home.body: We provide high impact talent for top organizations across North America. From a start-up to a Fortune 100, we are proud to partner with the most innovative clients, transforming their businesses while providing valuable insight to current market trends.

sectionMap.notes: Full-bleed hero video, overlay, LONDON APPROACH / MODERN STAFFING SOLUTIONS logo top-left, scroll arrow
Body copy + OUR SERVICES arrow link

hero.title: SERVICES
hero.body: We are a results-driven staffing firm that specializes in Temporary Solutions, Direct Hire Recruiting, Diversity Initiatives, and Retained Search.

categories.title: Information Technology
categories.body: What's your tech stack? Whether you have an implementation project or need a Director of IT, we are here to show you the hidden talent the market has to offer.

categories.title: Accounting & Finance
categories.body: We have an established network of experienced Accounting & Finance professionals. From a Senior Accountant to a Vice President of Finance, we source passive candidates and thoroughly vet them to determine culture and technical fit for your organization.

categories.title: Human Resources
categories.body: We have a solid cache of top tier HR talent with a range of expertise and specialties. From Talent Acquisition to DEI and HR Leadership professionals, we identify passive talent that will ensure your success as you grow.

categories.title: Engineering & Supply Chain
categories.body: Our staff augmentation and direct hire search team deploy engineering and supply chain talent to clientele ranging from mid-size engineering firms to big pharma. From a VP of Engineering to a temporary Project Manager, our technical recruitment specialists have developed relationships with the best and brightest.

categories.title: Administration
categories.body: We understand the importance of administrative support to keep your organization operating effectively. We have experience placing all levels of administration from an Executive Assistant to a Chief of Staff.

categories.title: Construction & Real Estate
categories.body: Our niche focus in Commercial Construction and Real Estate allows us to understand your hiring needs quickly and effectively. We speak your language and understand the nuances of project management, engineering, and asset management. Let us create a go-to-market strategy to recruit top construction talent that can impact your bottom line.

steps.title: Intake Meeting
steps.body: We get to know the soft sells and hard facts about your organization and why this role is open. We develop a game plan for your search and provide consultative feedback on current market conditions.

steps.title: Search Strategy
steps.body: We develop a branding strategy to highlight the career advantages of the opportunity and the impactful vision of the organization.

steps.title: Saturate the Market
steps.body: Our team engages with candidates across your region, uncovering and vetting passive talent while ensuring a diverse and inclusive candidate line up.

steps.title: Candidate Submittal
steps.body: After thoroughly vetting our candidates, we provide a debrief that includes a bio, LinkedIn profile, and a detailed resume.

steps.title: Sync Up Meeting
steps.body: Consult on candidate pipeline, providing additional market feedback including salary and bonus trends. Redirect search where needed and begin the interview process.

steps.title: Interviews & Debriefs
steps.body: Relax, we got this! We coordinate the interview and ensure our candidates come to the meeting prepared. We conduct a post-interview debrief, providing valuable feedback to both parties.

steps.title: Negotiate the Offer
steps.body: Expertise can make or break a deal. We understand the nuances of the offer stage, from sign on bonuses to counter offers, we build the rapport needed to navigate the difficult negotiations.

steps.title: Pop the Champagne!
steps.body: Time to celebrate. From reference checks to onboarding, we are here to ensure a smooth hiring process!

testimonials.quote: London Approach is our go-to agency! They have helped us place many positions across our organization for the last 4.5 years from temp, temp-to-hire, and direct hire. They are responsive, professional, friendly, and send qualified candidates whenever we have a need. I have recommended them for other organizations as well as for those looking for a position and will continue to do so. I would highly recommend London Approach for anyone searching for the perfect candidate and a great working relationship!
testimonials.author: Lindsey C

testimonials.quote: I loved working with the London Approach team. Searching for a new job can be nerve-wracking and anxiety inducing but they made this process worry free. I constantly was reassured that my needs and wants came first, and they were here to help! They provided insight on the job market and connected me with countless opportunities as well as interview tips and advice during each step of the process. I would recommend this company to anyone and will definitely work with them again if I find myself on the job market.
testimonials.author: Joe C
